title: Toggle Profile Visibility
description: The system shall allow a user to toggle their profile visibility between public and private.
rationale: To enable users to control who sees their profile, enhancing privacy and security settings.
business_value: Improves user trust and confidence in the platform by giving them greater control over their personal information.

source.description: As a user, I need to toggle my profile visibility between public and private so that I can control who sees my profile.

acceptance_criteria: Given I am on my profile settings page
When I toggle the profile visibility option
Then my profile visibility changes between public and private accordingly
preconditions: The user must be logged in to their account.
The profile settings page must be accessible.
postconditions: The user's profile visibility is updated to the selected state.
All users affected by the change (public to private) should no longer see the profile.
functional_constraints: The system must handle the toggle operation in less than 2 seconds.
security_requirements: Only authenticated users can access and modify their profile settings.
Profile visibility changes are logged for security audit purposes.

non_functional_requirements.performance: System response time to profile visibility toggle must be under 200ms.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available 99.9% of the time during peak usage periods.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system must support up to 1 million active users without significant performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and actionable, guiding the user on how to resolve issues.

edge_cases: What happens if the user toggles their profile visibility to private and then immediately logs out and back in?
How does the system handle a scenario where there are network issues during the toggle operation?

interfaces.name: Profile Settings API
interfaces.description: The system interacts with this API to retrieve and update profile settings.

interfaces.name: User Profiles Database
interfaces.description: This database stores the visibility status of user profiles.

test_cases.description: Verify that toggling profile visibility to public from private is successful.
test_cases.expected_result: The user's profile should be visible to everyone after the toggle operation.

test_cases.description: Verify that toggling profile visibility to private from public is successful.
test_cases.expected_result: The user's profile should be visible only to the user or authorized connections after the toggle operation.
